title: Has no one solved the problem with macOS installation ?
body: ### Issue Description ### Steps to reproduce the issue Steps to reproduce the issue 1. I installed it according to the official documentation, and there were problems throughout the process. 2.when I click the init and start button. an error message appeared. 3. I don't understand this message what are mean. 4. ### Describe the results you received Describe the results you received ### Describe the results you expected I just hope it installs successfully and works fine. ### podman info output ```yaml podman machine start Starting machine "podman-machine-default" Error: vfkit exited unexpectedly with exit code 1 podman info OS: darwin/amd64 provider: applehv version: 5.2.0 Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM Error: unable to connect to Podman socket: failed to connect: dial tcp 127.0.0.1:59179: connect: connection refused podman version Cannot connect to Podman. Please verify your connection to the Linux system using `podman system connection list`, or try `podman machine init` and `podman machine start` to manage a new Linux VM Error: unable to connect to Podman socket: failed to connect: dial tcp 127.0.0.1:59179: connect: connection refused ``` ### Podman in a container Yes ### Privileged Or Rootless None ### Upstream Latest Release Yes ### Additional environment details Additional environment details ### Additional information Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: Looks like you installed the amd64 version instead of the arm version? If you are on an arm system you need to install the arm version as you cannot run podman machine emulated, i.e. https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/download/v5.2.0/podman-installer-macos-arm64.pkg
